negative_controls.expected_failure: The verifier rejects the missing implementation.

negative_controls.description: Hardcode the visible incident and summary outputs.

negative_controls.description: Treat malformed numeric statuses as ordinary non-incidents instead of rejects.

negative_controls.description: Emit incidents in input order rather than timestamp order.

negative_controls.description: Sort rejected lines instead of preserving their input order.
